goals.title: Validate OpenSpec contract
acceptance: proposal, design, tasks and spec exist
openspec validate prove-learning-flywheel-operator-loop --strict passes

goals.title: Prove canonical OKF runtime in smoke
acceptance: knowledge runtime smoke resolves repo knowledge/ as canonical
packages/knowledge is not treated as production canonical knowledge
health checks do not write OKF

goals.title: Prove capability sync preview and apply
acceptance: dry-run reports drift with zero writes
apply is blocked when OKF validation fails
candidate capabilities cannot route workers

goals.title: Add batch goal import preview
acceptance: goals.batch.json preview reports import shape
preview creates no runtime records
apply creates planning records without starting workers

goals.title: Prove low-capacity worker start block
acceptance: low-capacity simulation blocks new running workers
prepared leases remain prepared
dashboard shows capacity blocked reason

goals.title: Prove loop closure creates learning evidence
acceptance: mock loop closes with eval, reflection and memory candidate
regression creates repair work item
no automatic memory promotion occurs

goals.title: Expose next safe action in Mission Control
acceptance: operator can run validate, sync preview, sync apply and close-loop actions
latest score delta and candidate links are visible
dashboard does not present packages/knowledge as production canonical

goals.title: Run final deterministic acceptance
acceptance: focused server tests pass
dashboard build passes
end-to-end smoke evidence is captured
